title: hebe decumbens
intro: Hebe decumbens, also known as the spreading hebe or prostrate hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to New Zealand, valued for its medicinal properties and ornamental value. The leaves and stems of Hebe decumbens contain compounds with antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Hebe decumbens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its health benefits include relief from anxiety, stress, and respiratory issues, as well as support for immune system function.
